/insights/inspection-forecast.note: No inspection history → InspectionForecastCard shows explanatory empty state with jurisdiction profile CTA. useDemoGuard active.

/insights/violation-radar.note: No risk data → ViolationRadarCard shows "No active risk signals" with explanation of what generates signals (temp deviations, overdue CAs, expired docs, overdue services).

/insights/trajectory.note: No snapshots → ComplianceTrajectoryCard shows "Your Compliance Trajectory builds over time" with guidance on what generates data points.

/insights/vendor-performance.note: No vendors → VendorPerformanceCard shows guidance to connect service vendors and track performance.

/shift-handoff.note: No shift data → Shows shift summary card with 0 counts and guidance to complete opening checklist. useDemoGuard shows sample stats in guided tour.

/insights/signals.note: No signals → JurisdictionSignalFeed shows "Your Signal Feed surfaces regulatory changes, recalls, and enforcement actions that affect your county." Clear and action-oriented.

/insights/leaderboard.note: No team activity → TeamLeaderboardCard shows guidance: "Your Team Leaderboard tracks who is contributing most to food safety." Points explained.

/insights.note: InsightsHub renders cards from sidebarConfig. If no insights items for role → "No insight tools are assigned to your role." Clean empty state.

/shift-handoff (notes).note: Empty notes field with placeholder text prompting user to leave shift notes. Clear and inviting.

/tasks (embedded).note: Tasks are embedded in various pages (dashboard, shift handoff). Empty: "No tasks assigned" with guidance.

/calendar.note: Calendar shows upcoming service dates, document expiries, and task due dates.

/notifications (bell).note: No notifications → badge hidden (count=0). NotificationPanel shows "All clear" empty state.

/notifications (panel).note: Empty panel shows "All clear! Notifications appear here when something needs your attention — temperature alerts, expiring documents, and regulatory updates."

/insights/signals (delivery).note: Signal delivery is admin-controlled via intelligence-approve edge function. No auto-delivery without admin approval.

/weekly-digest.note: Weekly digest is an edge function + email delivery. No standalone page. ai_weekly_digests table logs sent digests.

/kitchen-to-community.note: K2C page always renders mission content. Impact counter shows 0 if no donations. Demo mode shows sample data. Guided tour by design.

/referrals.note: ReferralDashboard uses demo seed data in guided tour. Production: real referral code generation via generateReferralCode(). Empty state shows invite CTA.

/sb1383.note: SB 1383 page uses demo data in guided tour (approved exception per CLAUDE.md). Empty state shows SB 1383 requirements explanation and "Add Your First Report" CTA.
